$schema: canonical caveat strings, extracted verbatim from packages/ts/src/calculator/index.ts. Every language's calculator embeds these constants byte-for-byte; see each package's conformance test. `lowVolume` is a template: substitute `{n}` with the feedback entry count.
sybil: Feedback is self-reported by clients and may include Sybil or spam entries; treat scores as a weak signal.
scale: On-chain feedback uses inconsistent score scales; averages are clamped to 0-100 and may overstate quality.
lowVolume: Only {n} feedback entries exist; statistics are not meaningful.
